page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Assess the quality of metagenome-assembled viral genomes.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Assess the quality of metagenome-assembled viral genomes.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: CheckV is a fully automated command-line pipeline for assessing the quality of single-contig viral genomes, including identification of host contamination for integrated proviruses, estimating completeness for genome fragments, and identification of closed genomes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CheckV is a fully automated command-line pipeline for assessing the quality of single-contig viral genomes, including identification of host contamination for integrated proviruses, estimating completeness for genome fragments, and identification of closed genomes.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: Assess quality of single-contig viral genomes
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: CheckV is a fully automated command-line pipeline for assessing the quality of single-contig viral genomes, including identification of host contamination for integrated proviruses, estimating completeness for genome fragments, and identification of closed genomes.
